zh.Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Bostock於1367年出生在英國爾保斯托時，他的父親Sir Adam De Bostock42歲，母親Margaret Whetenhall42歲。他和Joan Rudheath de Heath至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特。

zh-hans.Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Bostock于1367年出生在英国爾保斯托时，他的父亲Sir Adam De Bostock42岁，母亲Margaret Whetenhall42岁。他和Joan Rudheath de Heath至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Bostock was born in 1367, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Adam De Bostock, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Whetenhall, was 42. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Rudheath de Heath. He died in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Bostock est né en 1367, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam De Bostock, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whetenhall, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Rudheath de Heath. Il est décédé à Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Bostock 1367 in Bostock, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam De Bostock 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Whetenhall 42. Er hatte mit Joan Rudheath de Heath mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Bostock è nato il nel 1367 nel Bostock, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Adam De Bostock, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Whetenhall, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Joan Rudheath de Heath. Morì nel Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストケ-オン-トレント
ja.Bostock, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアボストック
ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Bostockが1367年にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで生まれた時，父Sir Adam De Bostockは42歳，母Margaret Whetenhallは42歳であった。彼はJoan Rudheath de Heathとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストケ-オン-トレントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Bostock(이)가 1367년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam De Bostock(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Whetenhall(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Joan Rudheath de Heath(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스토케--트렌트에서 사망했다.

mn.Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England: Stoke-on-Trent, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Bostock nasceu em 1367, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adam De Bostock, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whetenhall, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Joan Rudheath de Heath. Ele faleceu em Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Bostock родился в 1367 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam De Bostock было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whetenhall, 42. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Joan Rudheath de Heath. Он умер в местности стоке-он-трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Bostock nació en 1367, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Adam De Bostock, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Whetenhall, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Joan Rudheath de Heath. Murió en Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
